bull_case: Textbook uptrend: price above a fully stacked MA20>MA50>MA200, RSI 60 with room to run.
Forward P/E 17.7× against ~94% implied EPS growth — undemanding on forward math.
Wide moat (CUDA + full-stack platform) and dominant share in the defining compute cycle.
bear_case: Trailing P/E 34× and P/B 35× leave no margin for a demand air-pocket.
High beta 2.24 — drawdowns are violent (−20% peak-to-trough in the last year).
Customer concentration + custom-silicon competition + export-control policy risk.
Sitting -5.1% under resistance $236.54; near-term R:R to that level is poor (1.09).
key_assumptions: AI datacenter capex stays on its trajectory
risk_reward: Tactically capped (R:R 1.09 to $236.54); strategically favorable (R:R 5.52 to $304.0).
where_lanes_disagree: Technical + business-quality + industry are bullish; valuation flags trailing-multiple risk; structure says 'under resistance'. Net: own it, but accumulate rather than chase.
call: Buy / accumulate on the plan below; not an all-in-at-resistance trade.
